2606.11070.title: T1-Bench: Benchmarking Multi-Scenario Agents in Real-World Domains
2606.11070.paper_summary: Recent advances in reasoning and tool-calling capabilities of large language models (LLMs) have enabled increasingly capable agentic systems. However, existing benchmarks remain limited in task complexity, realism, and domain diversity, and often fail to capture interactions that span multiple domains, limiting their ability to evaluate agents in realistic multi-step settings that require sustained reasoning and coordination. To address these limitations, we introduce T1-Bench, a high-fidelity, comprehensive benchmark for evaluating agentic systems in realistic customer-facing, multi-domain environments, featuring interleaved scenarios that require structured reasoning across multi-turn user-assistant interactions and substantially increasing both compositional complexity and evaluative rigor across 25 domains of varying difficulty. We evaluate T1-Bench using 12 proprietary and open-weight models, providing a reproducible and standardized framework for assessing agent behavior, tool utilization, and conversational quality in complex, multi-step environments. We further complement automatic evaluation with human judgments to strengthen the assessment of qualitative performance. Overall, T1-Bench substantially advances prior benchmarks by increasing task complexity, interaction depth, and domain coverage in simulated multi-domain environments. To facilitate future research on agentic systems, we will publicly release data and evaluation code as open source.
2606.11070.paper_summary_zh: 最近在大型語言模型（LLMs）的推理和工具調用能力方面的進展，使得越來越有能力的代理系統得以實現。<lb/>然而，現有的基準在任務複雜性、現實性和領域多樣性方面仍然有限，並且往往無法捕捉跨越多個領域的互動，限制了它們在需要持續推理和協調的現實多步驟環境中評估代理的能力。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，我們推出了 T1-Bench，一個高保真度、全面的基準，用於在現實的面向客戶的多領域環境中評估代理系統，特徵是需要跨越多輪用戶-助手互動的結構化推理的交錯場景，並顯著提高了在25個難度不一的領域中的組合複雜性和評估嚴謹性。<lb/>我們使用12個專有和開放權重模型來評估 T1-Bench，提供了一個可重複和標準化的框架，用於評估代理行為、工具利用和在複雜多步驟環境中的對話質量。<lb/>我們進一步用人類判斷來補充自動評估，以加強對質量表現的評估。<lb/>總體而言，T1-Bench 通過提高任務複雜性、互動深度和在模擬多領域環境中的領域覆蓋，顯著推進了先前的基準。<lb/>為了促進未來對代理系統的研究，我們將公開發布數據和評估代碼作為開源。
2606.11070.author: Genta Indra Winata et.al.
2606.11070.authors: Genta Indra Winata, Amartya Chakraborty, Yuzhen Lin, Swasthi P Rao, Shikhhar Siingh, Houhan Lu, Nadia Bathaee, Sriharsha Hatwar, Paresh Dashore, Anmol Jain, Kshitij Tayal, Xiuzhu Lin, Anirban Das, Sambit Sahu, Shi-Xiong Zhang
